summary: Iteration 105: Push Notification & Activity Feed Features - All tests passed (9/9 backend, UI verified). VAPID key fix confirmed (line 4 in .env), service-worker.js has complete push handler with renotify/vibrate/includeUncontrolled, send_push_to_admins() calls on habit completion, ActivityFeed component renders on admin dashboard with live polling.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ VAPID key fix: frontend/.env line 4 - REACT_APP_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY is on separate line (not concatenated with ENABLE_HEALTH_CHECK)
✅ service-worker.js: Has push event handler (line 44) with showNotification, renotify:true, vibrate:[200,100,200], notificationclick with includeUncontrolled:true
✅ Backend: complete_habit endpoint (line 8955) calls send_push_to_admins on habit completion (lines 8981-8986)
✅ Backend: All 3 webpush calls have content_encoding='aes128gcm' (lines 1330, 1380, 1428)
✅ Frontend: ActivityFeed has data-testid='activity-feed' and data-testid='activity-list'
✅ Frontend: ActivityFeed shows green pulsing indicator with 'Listening' or 'X new' status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Push notification features complete. Test file: test_iteration_105_push_activityfeed.py. Key endpoints: GET /api/users/vapid-public-key (returns VAPID public key), GET /api/admin/activity-feed?since=<ISO>&limit=N (admin auth required), POST /api/habits/{id}/complete (triggers admin push). Habit ID for testing: 99306d6a-5ac8-4d24-98ed-542aefcabcfd. ActivityFeed polls every 8 seconds and shows on admin dashboard with data-testid='activity-feed'.

verified_features.details: Returns valid VAPID public key starting with 'B'
Returns {activities: []} array with admin auth, supports since/limit params
Endpoint completes habit and calls send_push_to_admins without crash

verified_features.feature: Frontend .env VAPID key on separate line
verified_features.details: Line 4: REACT_APP_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY is on its own line (not concatenated)
Has push event (line 44), showNotification, renotify:true, vibrate, notificationclick with includeUncontrolled:true
data-testid='activity-feed' visible, shows 'Live Activity' header with green pulsing indicator
data-testid='activity-list' contains items with user names and details
Green animate-ping dot with 'Listening' or 'X new' status text
All 3 webpush calls in server.py use aes128gcm encoding (lines 1330, 1380, 1428)
